para_trans: Awarded by the Centre for the financial year 2026-27
Administration of Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana
Approval to disburse and spend funds for expenditure
about the giving.
Government of Maharashtra
Department of Women and Child Development,
Government Decision No: - ABVI-2026 / Q.64 / Ka-5
New Administration Building, 3rd Floor,
Madam Cama Marg, Martyrdom Rajguru Chowk,
Mantralaya, Mumbai - 400 032.
Date: July 22, 2026.
The Government's Decisions:
For administrative expenses of the Centrally Sponsored Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana, the following is the statement of account number:
For the purpose of title / purpose of account in (1), the total amount as per Rakaana No. (3) is Rs. 2. 00 crores (letters two crores only / -)
Government approves disbursement and expenditure of such funds to Commissioner, Integrated Child Development Services Scheme, Navi Mumbai
is being provided.
(Rs. in crores)
2. The Commissioner, Integrated Child Development Services Scheme, Navi Mumbai has provided the following:
The funds should be spent in the prescribed manner.
3. The said Government Decision Finance Department Informal Reference No. 224 / Expenditure - 6D. Given under 2.7.2026
It is being released as per consensus.
